node.text:
Through structured training and a supportive environment, the Ladies Golf Development Program helps women advance their game while strengthening networks beyond the course⁣
⁣
#aramco

The Ladies Golf Development Program provides women with a dedicated space to refine their skills, build confidence, and form meaningful connections⁣
⁣
#aramco

The Ladies Golf Development Program empowers women to grow, compete, and connect, supporting the advancement of their skills and strengthening community through sport⁣
⁣
#aramco

user.full_name: Aston Martin Aramco Formula One™ Team

node.text:
Hosted at Ithra, an Aramco initiative dedicated to inspiring innovation and unlocking human potential, the debut of the AMR26 Formula 1 car livery reflects a partnership milestone unveiled in a place built to spark ideas and shape inspiration ⁣
⁣
#aramco

user.full_name: Aston Martin Aramco Formula One™ Team

node.text:
In 2022, we proudly partnered with Aston Martin Aramco, driven by a shared ambition to advance innovation and performance⁣
⁣
#aramco

user.full_name: Aston Martin Aramco Formula One™ Team

node.text:
Making its debut in the Kingdom, the AMR26 Formula 1 car livery is unveiled for the first time ⁣
⁣
Designed by Adrian Newey and powered by Aramco ProForce+, an FIA-compliant, 100% sustainable fuel, marking a new chapter for the partnership⁣
⁣
#aramco

Through the supply of lower-carbon biofuel, we demonstrated their performance and consistency under the most demanding conditions, reinforcing our focus on supporting transport solutions⁣
⁣
#aramco

By supplying lower-carbon biofuel, we demonstrated their performance, consistency, and potential to further inform the development of lower-carbon fuels⁣
 ⁣
#aramco

The Dacia Sandriders team showcased the intensity of motorsport and the role of innovation in pushing boundaries⁣
⁣
Through supplying teams with our lower-carbon biofuel, we aim to contribute to excellence in one of the world’s most challenging races⁣
⁣
#aramco

Working hand in hand, driven by responsibility and a commitment to excellence, our teams remain vigilant to ensure performance, safety, and continuity across our facilities⁣
⁣
#aramco

As we continue to deliver reliable energy to the world, our teams work around the clock, in coordinated shifts, to support one another and uphold the standards that keep our operations moving forward⁣
⁣
#aramco

Long after one shift ends and before another begins, commitment remains. At every hour, our people apply expertise, discipline, and care to keep operations performing at their best, safely, seamlessly, without pause⁣
⁣
#aramco

Through the Aramco F4 Saudi Arabian Championship, we continue to support and uplift Saudi talent in motorsport, creating pathways for young drivers like Farah Al Yousef, whose passion for racing and STEM fuels her ambition to grow, compete, and define what’s possible ⁣
⁣
#aramco

We team up with the F4 Saudi Arabian Championship to fuel the dreams of young motorsport fans⁣
⁣
Together, we're helping passionate young Saudis to chase their goals and become the next wave of engineers, drivers, and innovators in the exciting world of Formula racing⁣
⁣
#aramco

At the #U17WC Final, Al Qadsiah youth experienced firsthand what makes global sports so inspiring⁣
 ⁣
Through our relationship with Al Qadsiah, we aim to harness sport as a platform to create opportunity⁣
 ⁣
#aramco

Leveraging our partnership with #FIFA, we invited members of Al Qadsiah’s Young Qadsawi Program for a once-in-a-lifetime experience, witnessing the stars of tomorrow up close at the #U17WC Final⁣
 ⁣
#aramco

We are bringing youth closer to the action, inspiring growth, igniting ambition, and unlocking new opportunities through our initiatives that support their empowerment and fuel their passion⁣
⁣
#aramco

On #InternationalVolunteerDay, we celebrate the spirit of giving that unites our volunteers, using their skills, time, and compassion to uplift communities 

#aramco

Today, we recognize the dedication of our volunteers whose commitment to service continues to empower communities and inspire hope⁣
⁣
#InternationalVolunteerDay⁣
#aramco

This #InternationalVolunteerDay, we honor volunteers who share their expertise across technology, education, safety, and finance, turning knowledge into meaningful service that strengthens communities⁣
⁣
#aramco

As we continue to foster the growth of micro-industries in the Kingdom, we aim to support local communities, helping them build a more sustainable future and promote economic growth⁣
⁣
#aramco

As part of our efforts to support local artisans and preserve traditional crafts for future generations, we have launched the Al Mahud Bisht Factory in the Al Ahsa region, in partnership with the Fatat Al-Ahsa Charity Associations and Development Society, as well as the Herfah Cooperative Association, with the aim of creating sustainable opportunities for specialized Bisht production⁣
⁣
#aramco

His Royal Highness Prince Saud bin Talal bin Badr, Governor of Al Ahsa, inaugurated the Al Mahoud Bisht Factory in the Al Ahsa region, as part of our initiatives to support local artisans and communities, empower individuals to develop their skills, and enhance local production of traditional crafts⁣
⁣
#aramco

The top three winning teams of the #AramcoInnovationAward at the WRO International Final 2025 are Costa Rica, Malaysia, and Australia⁣
⁣
Recognizing their creativity, teamwork, and determination, the winners will take part in an immersive week of learning and hands-on exposure in STEM, with the aim to support their career ambitions⁣
⁣
Through our partnership with World Robot Olympiad, we continue advancing STEM education and empower young innovators shaping the future of technology⁣
⁣
#aramco

Through our Global Citizenship Program and our partnership with World Robot Olympiad, we are helping young innovators turn ambition into impact⁣
⁣
The #AramcoInnovationAward, presented at the WRO International Final 2025, recognizes student teams whose ideas bring innovative solutions closer to reality while encouraging them to pursue careers that shape the future of energy and technology⁣
⁣
#aramco

At the WRO International Final 2025, our booth brought STEM learning to life, giving students a hands-on experience that connected creativity with technology⁣
⁣
Every interaction and demonstration was designed to inspire the next generation of innovators⁣
⁣
#aramco

Together with Aston Martin, we are seeing how lower-carbon fuels perform on the racetrack ⁣
⁣
Learning from every lap with the aim to accelerate progress toward a lower-carbon future⁣
⁣
#aramco

From the lab to the track, we are leveraging our partnership with Aston Martin Aramco, aiming to turn innovative ideas into real-world breakthroughs⁣
⁣
#aramco

node.text:
Introducing our first ever special edition livery at the #USGP.

See the Science behind F1 with #Aramco.

Across the Kingdom, journeys were documented and connections preserved⁣
⁣
A legacy captured through people, places, and progress⁣
⁣
#aramco

A face that guided discovery 📷⁣
⁣
Khamis Bin Ramthan, the human compass, stands as a reminder that our greatest achievements began with human intuition and perseverance⁣
⁣
#aramco

Preserving moments of collaboration that shaped our shared history⁣
⁣
These moments reflect the spirit of partnership that continues to drive progress across our operations⁣
⁣
#aramco

Through the Energy Access Program, a part of our Global Citizenship Program, we aim to empower communities by providing solutions that improve quality of life and contribute toward a more sustainable future⁣
⁣
#aramco

Access to reliable and efficient energy remains a critical enabler of social and economic development⁣
⁣
Addressing this need can help advance community health, education, and quality of life⁣
⁣
#aramco

As part of our Global Citizenship Program, we aim to support rural communities and empower future generations through energy access⁣
⁣
#aramco

We strive to encourage imagination, collaboration, and STEM education in young minds, and through Aramco STEM Racing we aim to bring these values to life in the most exciting way, showing that innovation begins with bold ideas⁣
⁣
#aramco

With millions of young people participating from all over the world, the Aramco STEM Racing World Finals brought together future STEM leaders and scientists in a display of passion, creativity, and innovation ⁣
⁣
#aramco

Through supporting Aramco STEM Racing, we aim to continue inspiring future generations while promoting STEM education, helping equip the youth with the skills needed to enable a better tomorrow⁣
⁣
#aramco

Saudi coffee is an integral part of the community's culture and a prominent feature of its daily traditions⁣
⁣
Through the Saudi Coffee Cultivation and Production initiative, a part of our corporate social responsibility initiatives, we support local farmers and provide the infrastructure necessary for them to expand their production of coffee beans, enabling them to earn a sustainable income and support their communities⁣
⁣
#aramco

Beekeeping is a traditional craft deeply rooted in the community and an important source of income for many families⁣
⁣
We support this profession through our corporate social responsibility initiative, the Beekeeping and Honey Production initiative, providing beekeepers with essential training and resources to help sustain the craft and preserve the environmental balance associated with it⁣
⁣
#aramco

Dates are part of our agricultural heritage and a rich local resource⁣
⁣
Through our corporate social responsibility initiative, the date production and related food industries development initiative, we support farmers with knowledge and modern agricultural techniques to enhance production and improve the quality of dates, ensuring the sustainability of this authentic craft⁣
⁣
#aramco

Through our exploration activities, we’re identifying and extracting lithium and other critical transition minerals with the aim to help support energy storage, renewable energy technologies, and a lower-carbon future⁣
⁣
#aramco

By leveraging decades of subsurface data and mining expertise, we are working toward positioning the Kingdom as a leading global supplier of transition minerals, supporting the global energy transition⁣
⁣
#aramco

Through advanced exploration and extraction of critical minerals, we are working toward helping support the global energy transition⁣
⁣
#aramco

Coordinating in real time, our Fire Emergency Support Center aids our firefighters in their mission, helping deliver smarter and faster emergency response across the Kingdom⁣
⁣
#aramco

Through proactive safety inspections, fire drills, and emergency readiness programs, our firefighters help reduce risks, protect employees, and maintain uninterrupted operations across all sites, supporting us as we deliver reliable energy to the world⁣
⁣
#aramco

With advanced training and constant vigilance, our firefighters help maintain a safe and secure work environment where people are protected and thrive⁣
⁣
#aramco

We work every day to provide the world with the energy it needs, powering lives, industries, and growth⁣
⁣
#aramco

We are bringing energy closer to communities across the Kingdom and around the globe, powering journeys of every kind⁣
⁣
#aramco

Our premium offerings are designed to power modern engines efficiently, supporting mobility, productivity, and economic growth, while reflecting our legacy of reliably supplying energy to customers⁣
⁣
#aramco

A drop from you... Life for others 🩸⁣
⁣
Since our early days, we strived toward playing an active role in serving our communities and promoting social responsibility, and through our Blood Donation Program, we turn one small act into a life-changing gift⁣
⁣
#aramco

We have long understood that blood donation is both a humanitarian and national responsibility ⁣
⁣
Through our blood donation campaigns, we continue to support healthcare systems, strengthen communities, and work toward a better future⁣
⁣
#aramco

On #InternationalYouthDay, our youth highlighted their ambition: “Becoming a heard voice at the table, a believer in innovation and an accomplisher of impossible ideas.” As mentioned by Madaawi AlRumaih⁣
⁣
#aramco

On #InternationalYouthDay, our youth highlighted their ambition: “Aramco did not only sponsor me as a student, it also gave me the opportunity to go into different fields and challenges that I can overcome when I go back as a reservoir engineer.” As mentioned by Abdullah Alzahrani⁣
⁣
#aramco

On #InternationalYouthDay, our youth highlighted their ambition: “My dream is to contribute to projects that advance industrial automation and inspire other engineers to explore innovative solutions.” As mentioned by Sara Al Sabti⁣
⁣
#aramco

With over 43 million mangroves planted as of 2024, we’re turning environmental ambition into measurable impact, as we aim to create lasting benefits for both nature and our communities⁣
⁣
#aramco

With our ambitions set on planting 300 million mangroves across the Kingdom, we continue to work toward protecting and restoring natural ecosystems, enhancing local wildlife habitats, and contributing to a lower-emission future⁣
⁣
#aramco

By investing in nature-based solutions like mangroves, we aim to support the Kingdom’s biodiversity and strengthening coastal resilience as mangroves provide habitats for diverse wildlife species, nurseries for juvenile marine life, and a crucial natural defense against natural disasters⁣
⁣
#aramco

At the enhanced Aramco SIM Arena, fans will be able to immerse themselves in new and interactive motorsports activities⁣
⁣
@EWC_EN⁣
#aramco

We return as strategic partner of the EWC, the world’s largest esports and gaming event, where we drive innovation in esports racing, delivering a world-class, inspiring fan experience⁣
⁣
⁣
@EWC_EN⁣
#aramco

The Aramco Esports Championship will run across two “seasons” during the seven-week EWC, with weekly online races leading to an in-person finale at the Aramco SIM Arena⁣
⁣
@EWC_EN⁣
#aramco

We were proud to be part of a  thrilling weekend of world-class golf with top players from around the world coming together for the LIV Golf Dallas presented by Aramco⁣
⁣
@livgolf_league⁣
#aramco

The weekend saw Aramco and LIV Golf deliver a number of community impact programmes aimed to support, celebrate and inspire educators and students through the game of golf⁣
 ⁣
#aramco

The weekend once again featured Aramco’s exclusive Aramco Power Player Rankings⁣
 ⁣
A dynamic stat-driven system that highlights LIV Golf’s most dominant and impactful players⁣
 ⁣
#aramco

We provide the tools, training, and opportunities to support our teams in delivering safe, efficient, and high-quality operations⁣
⁣
#aramco

A closer look at the people and processes driving our engineering and drilling operations, with precision and purpose⁣
⁣
#aramco

Every ambition begins with a goal. For our engineers, it’s about building expertise, pushing boundaries, and making a real impact⁣
⁣
#aramco

As part of our efforts to enhance marine biodiversity and preserve the livelihoods of coastal communities that depend on healthy fish stocks, we launch the Regional Center for Sustainable Development of Fisheries to help drive long-term, science-based solutions focused on restoration and sustainability⁣
⁣
#aramco

Aiming to support ecosystem recovery, the Regional Center for Sustainable Development of Fisheries focuses on the species better suited for the ecosystem and raises them in conditions supported by science⁣
⁣
Every stage of the process, from cultivation to release, is designed to help strengthen marine biodiversity⁣
⁣
#aramco

At the Regional Center for Sustainable Development of Fisheries, every fish raised contributes to supporting a mission rooted in restoration, recovery, and sustainability⁣
⁣
#aramco

With advanced aquaculture systems, the Regional Center for Sustainable Development of Fisheries aims to advance ecosystem restoration and biodiversity through precise, science-driven fish cultivation⁣
⁣
#aramco

Blending generations of local fishing knowledge with advanced aquaculture systems, we’re working toward helping native fish species return to their natural habitats⁣
⁣
#aramco

At the Regional Center for Sustainable Development of Fisheries, we’re working toward promoting biodiversity through nature-based solutions, helping restore marine ecosystems and protect native species for generations to come⁣
⁣
#aramco

When students from different backgrounds come together, it sparks creativity and pushes boundaries⁣
⁣
The winners of the Aramco Innovation Award from Venezuela visited the University of Manchester to interact with peers and learn from experienced teachers⁣
⁣
#aramco

Innovation begins when ideas are shared⁣
⁣
Through their visit to the University of Manchester, the Aramco Innovation Award 2024 winners, in collaboration with World Robot Olympiad, experienced how STEM can bridge cultures and inspire new ways of thinking⁣
⁣
#aramco

Immersive STEM workshops helped the winning team of the Aramco Innovation Award, in collaboration with World Robot Olympiad, to not only understand theory but also apply it to real-world challenges⁣
⁣
During their visit to the University of Manchester, the team gained hands-on experience and built meaningful connections with students and professors ⁣
⁣
#aramco

By engaging in interactive STEM activities, the immersion week for our Aramco Innovation Award winners continues to broaden their horizons, supporting their interest in STEM education and nurturing the problem-solving mindset that will drive tomorrow’s innovations⁣
⁣
@astonmartinf1⁣
#aramco

The Robotic Dreamers team, winners of World Robot Olympiad, revved up their creativity at Aston Martin Aramco Formula One™ Team, immersing themselves in a hands-on workshop that aims to inspire innovation and further their passion for STEM education⁣
⁣
@astonmartinf1⁣
#aramco

Learning is a lifelong journey⁣
⁣
Through our immersion week, we support the winning team of World Robotics Olympiad 2024 as they explore new ideas and gain real-world experience⁣
⁣
@astonmartinf1⁣
#aramco

At the Aston Martin Aramco Formula One™️ Team engineering labs, the three young innovators who won the Aramco Innovation Award at the 2024 World Robot Olympiad, Robotic Dreamers, were immersed in a unique hands-on learning experience⁣
⁣
They explored how robots power everything from car design to data analysis, gaining insights from top engineers⁣
⁣
#aramco

Accompanied by Jessica Hawkins, a racing driver for Aston Martin Aramco Formula One™️ Team, three young innovators, winners of the Aramco Innovation Award at the 2024 World Robot Olympiad, set out on an exciting journey of knowledge and discovery, fueling their passion for STEM education⁣
⁣
#aramco

Visiting the Aston Martin Aramco Formula One™️ Team HQ gave the Aramco Innovation Award winners of the 2024 World Robot Olympiad a rare look into real-world engineering environments⁣
⁣
It’s through opportunities like this that young minds begin transforming curiosity into innovation⁣
⁣
#aramco

Through our efforts, our Biodiversity Protection Areas safeguard over 800 native species, from specialized dune flora to diverse coastal and desert ecosystems, demonstrating our efforts towards protecting the Kingdom's rich biodiversity⁣
⁣
#EndangeredSpeciesDay⁣
#aramco

Along the Kingdom’s coastline, green and hawksbill turtles are saved, treated and released at our rescue and rehabilitation center ⁣
⁣
From emergency care to safe release, by saving sea turtles and restoring their habitats, this initiative is a step toward protecting marine life in the Arabian Gulf⁣
⁣
#EndangeredSpeciesDay⁣
#aramco

From the coral reefs of the Red Sea to the juniper forests of the 'Asir Mountains, the Kingdom's diverse landscapes are home to many species⁣
⁣
#EndangeredSpeciesDay⁣
#aramco

Operator and engineer at Ras Tanura, 1948 📸⁣
⁣
It began with a shared vision of excellence, but what truly powered progress was the collaboration of the people behind it⁣
⁣
Engineers and geologists working side by side, proving that when minds meet, the future follows⁣
⁣
#aramco

Exploration party crewmen with Khamis Ibn Rimthan at their campsite in 1955 📸⁣
⁣
When collaboration meets curiosity, endless possibility ignites⁣
 ⁣
Together, we've turned energy into innovation, shaping the future, one breakthrough at a time⁣
⁣
#aramco

What began as a partnership between our people’s skills in the 1930s became a catalyst for discoveries and breakthroughs⁣
⁣
Together, we turned potential into progress, and the legacy of that collaboration continues to drive innovation forward⁣
⁣
#aramco

Driving the growth of women’s golf forward with the Aramco Korea Championship⁣
⁣
#aramco

Leading female golfers from around the world come to Seoul for the Aramco Korea Championship⁣
⁣
#aramco

The Aramco Korea Championship wraps up after a memorable week of competition ⁣
⁣
#aramco

The ortolan bunting 📸⁣
⁣
Traveling from its breeding grounds in Europe to West and Central Africa for the winter, it finds sanctuary in many of our designated Biodiversity Protection Areas⁣
⁣
We continue conserving biodiversity hotspots in the areas we operate to support wildlife populations for generations to come⁣
⁣
#aramco

The isabelline shrike 📸⁣
⁣
Often traveling solo, it journeys from Central Asia to tropical wintering zones, making a stop in the Kingdom⁣
⁣
Our Biodiversity Protection Areas provide migratory bird species a place to rest and feed⁣
⁣
#aramco

The spotted redshank 📸⁣
⁣
One of many migratory birds that find shelter in our protected areas ⁣
⁣
We help conserve their habitats in our Biodiversity Protection Areas, providing resting and feeding stops along epic migration routes⁣
⁣
#aramco

Through partnerships in Formula 1, we're highlighting the real-world impact of science and technology, inspiring young minds to pursue careers that could solve tomorrow's challenges⁣
⁣
#aramco

Precision, preparation, and collaboration are essential qualities in motorsport and essential skills we're fostering through our STEM initiatives to equip future leaders⁣
⁣
#aramco

Every race is a chance to apply advanced engineering and teamwork in action, demonstrating how STEM expertise drives high-performance results on and off the track 🏎️⁣
⁣
#aramco
